riskDescription: High probability of equipment failure due to aging fleet and inadequate maintenance
historicalPatterns: Similar pattern observed in Q3 2025 led to major breakdown
mitigationStrategy: Implement immediate preventive maintenance program and equipment replacement plan
recommendedAction: Schedule comprehensive equipment audit within 7 days

riskDescription: Potential risk of water contamination in nearby stream due to tailings dam seepage
riskIndicators: Water quality readings showing elevated metals
historicalPatterns: No previous incidents at this site
mitigationStrategy: Enhance tailings dam monitoring and implement additional seepage control measures
recommendedAction: Conduct comprehensive water quality assessment and dam integrity check
